message: Node started: Let w(m) denote the Hamming weight of a non-negative integer m, defined as the number of set bits in its binary representation, i.e., w(m) = sum_{i=0}^{floor(log2(m))} (floor(m * 2^-i) mod 2). Let S be the set of all positive integers n in the domain of natural numbers N. Define the function k(n) = w(2023 * n). Find the value of min_{n in N} k(n).
